title: Pan-Seared Australian Fish
description: This recipe is a simple yet flavorful dish showcasing the freshness of Australian fish. Serve with a side of steamed vegetables for a well-rounded meal.

ingredients.name: Australian Fish (400g)
ingredients.notes: Fresh fish, preferably cod or snapper

instructions: 2. Season the fish with Delicate Fish Seasoning and a pinch of salt and pepper.
3. Heat olive oil in an oven-safe pan over medium heat.
4. Add the fish to the pan and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
5. Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Serve the fish hot with a squeeze of lemon and a side of steamed vegetables.
7. For an added touch, serve with a side of sushi rice.
8. Garnish with fresh parsley and additional lemon wedges, if desired.
